text:
There was just you. That was a year ago. Now I have you.

Just think about all the joy you've gotten the past year. That little furball? He loves chasing butterflies. She loves sleeping in warm things. You love hanging out with them. Isn't that something?

I've seen pictures. You're so much fun now. You carry tiny treasures everywhere. Sometimes just a funny hat. Other times tiny boots. Sometimes just a silly smile you paint your face purple. You teach oldesters like me lots of fun things.

You've grown since you could wiggle your toes last year. Your nose gets big. Your little eyes gleam. You just have a blast.

I hear you squealing sometimes. Do something fun!

You're just a speck now. Tiny little bones. But you'll make it big someday. And maybe then you can talk. Or just sing. You'll make awesome songs. I bet.

You're my favorite pet ever. I watch
